menu.description: Text of the button that opens the menu.

getInvolved.description: Title of the list of links to perform actions on PREreview, such as reviewing a preprint or requesting a review.

findOutMore.description: Title of the list of links with details about PREreview as an organization.

chooseLanguage.description: Title of the list of languages for the user to select from.

myAccount.description: Title of the list of links to manage your account.

menuBlog.description: Text of the link to the PREreview blog.

menuAboutUs.description: Text of the link to the page with details about PREreview as an organization.

menuHowToUse.description: Text of the link to the page with instructions on how to use PREreview.

menuDonate.description: Text of the link to the page where you can donate to PREreview.

menuMyDetails.description: Text of the link to the page where you can view and edit your account details.

menuNewNotification.description: Label that appears when there is something for the user to look at.

menuMyPrereviews.description: Link in the menu to a list of PREreviews that you’ve written.

menuMyReviewRequests.description: Link in the menu to a list of review requests that you’ve made.

menuLogOut.description: Text of the link to log out of your account.

menuLogIn.description: Text of the link to log in to your account.

menuLogInDemoUser.message: Log in as a demo user
menuLogInDemoUser.description: Link that logs you in as a special user for demonstration purposes.

menuReviews.description: Link in the menu to a list of PREreviews that have been published.

menuReviewsHint.description: Text that accompanies the “Reviews” link in the menu.

menuRequests.description: Link in the menu to a list of review requests that have been published.

menuRequestsHint.message: Help an author by reviewing their preprint.
menuRequestsHint.description: Text that accompanies the “Requests” link in the menu.

menuTrainings.description: Link in the menu to a list of peer review training workshops that PREreview offers.

menuTrainingsHint.message: Learn about ethical and constructive peer review.
menuTrainingsHint.description: Text that accompanies the “Trainings” link in the menu.

menuChampions.description: Link in the menu to the Champions Program page.

menuChampionsHint.message: Find out about our annual program.
menuChampionsHint.description: Text that accompanies the link in the menu to the Champions Program page.

menuLiveReviews.description: Link in the menu to a list of Live Reviews that PREreview runs.

menuResources.description: Link in the menu to a list of resources that PREreview has published.

menuStatistics.description: Link in the menu to statistics pages, e.g. the number of PREreviews published.

menuClubs.description: Link in the menu to a list of PREreview Clubs.

menuClubsHint.description: Text that accompanies the “Clubs” link in the menu.

onlyEnglish.message: This page is only available in English.
onlyEnglish.description: Text that appears when a page is only available in English.
